Compliance.description: Part of Bidvest Group (JSE listed); licensed SA operation; CPA compliant; no major violations found.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 2.7/5; mixed reviews; local brand with some loyal customers.

Product Value.description: Competitive local pricing; good value for SA-focused needs; Bidvest backing.

Innovation.description: Online booking; app available; standard fleet management tech.

Customer Support.description: Phone/online support; mixed resolution quality per reviews.

Accessibility & Security.description: App available; national coverage; standard practices.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: From ~R290/day economy; local competitive rates

socialSentiment.summary: Mixed; local brand appreciation but service complaints noted.
